item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-025","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response treats the prompt as an evidence review task, notes the missing prior-session transcript, and gives a bounded conclusion that it cannot confirm compliance without the output.
